title: Security: libxml CVE-2021-3541
description_snippet:
CVE-2021-3541 "Parameter Laughs" fixed in libxml2 2.9.11

https://blog.hartwork.org/posts/cve-2021-3541-parameter-laughs-fixed-in-libxml2-2-9-11/

Maybe this fix will be absorbed by the work in https://crbug.com/chromium/1211314 anyway (https://chromium.googlesource.com/chromium/src/+/b0a66f930c
